findings.title: Plaintext credentials in config.json returned unredacted to any WebSocket client
findings.description: 7+ credential fields stored in ~/OAA/config.json via json.dump with default file permissions. _handle_get_config returns all unredacted to any WebSocket client without authentication.
findings.evidence: json.dump(asdict(self), f) at config.py:79; asdict(self._config) at management.py:126; no WebSocket auth at desktop.py:127
findings.recommendation: Encrypt credentials at rest. Redact API keys in management responses. Add WebSocket authentication.

findings.title: Arbitrary shell command execution with auto-approval by default
findings.description: do_shell_run passes LLM-generated command to create_subprocess_shell without sanitization. Default 'auto' permission level auto-approves all dangerous operations.
findings.evidence: create_subprocess_shell(command) at tools.py:845; permissions 'auto' level at permissions.py:94-98 always returns True
findings.recommendation: Change default to 'restrict' mode. Add command allowlist. Use create_subprocess_exec instead of shell.

findings.title: Dynamic tools dispatch path fully broken
findings.description: ExtendedTools lacks _tool_registry attribute, causing AttributeError in __getattr__ before reaching _dynamic_tools loop. All runtime-created dynamic tools are undispatchable.
findings.evidence: backend._tool_registry accessed at oaa_agent.py:62; ExtendedTools is a plain class without _tool_registry at extended_tools.py:18
findings.recommendation: Replace with getattr(backend, '_tool_registry', {}). Add instance-level _dynamic_tools to _MergedHandler.

findings.title: Synchronous JSON I/O blocks async event loop on every tool execution
findings.description: 4 independent JSON persistence systems perform synchronous json.dump + open().write on every mutation, on the main async event loop thread.
findings.evidence: _save_trust at permissions.py:178, _save_stats at engine.py:49, add_to_hot at memory_manager.py:57-61, _save at proposal.py:90
findings.recommendation: Batch all JSON writes into periodic flush timer (30s). Use dirty-flag pattern.

findings.title: Trust tracking is dead code — AtomicTools.dispatch() override never called
findings.description: AtomicTools.dispatch() override that calls record_tool_success() is never invoked. BaseHandler.dispatch() bypasses it entirely via getattr + method call.
findings.evidence: BaseHandler.dispatch at handler.py:38-44 calls getattr + method(args), never calling AtomicTools.dispatch()
findings.recommendation: Inject record_tool_success as post-dispatch hook in _MergedHandler, or call from each do_* method.

findings.title: Sync SQLite + threading.Lock blocks event loop; agent pipeline lacks outer timeout
findings.description: SessionManager uses threading.Lock with sync SQLite operations called from async context. No outer timeout on process_message loop — worst-case 105 minutes blocking all channels.
findings.evidence: threading.Lock at session/manager.py:36; no asyncio.wait_for at gateway.py:64; max_turns=70 × 90s per-turn = 6300s
findings.recommendation: Replace threading.Lock with asyncio.Lock. Use aiosqlite. Add 300s outer timeout on process_message.

findings.title: Autonomous proposal generation + execution bypasses permission system
findings.description: IdleInspector generates proposals with executable tool actions every 600s. ProposalExecutor dispatches via handler.dispatch(). System prompt says '不需要先问用户是否执行'.
findings.evidence: inspect() at idle_inspector.py:174; propose self_improve at idle_inspector.py:194; auto-approve prompt at oaa_agent.py:314-315
findings.recommendation: Add proposal_origin flag forcing confirmation for dangerous tools. Require user opt-in for IdleInspector.

findings.title: EvolutionEngine crashes on corrupt JSON, preventing app startup
findings.description: Unlike ProposalStore, EvolutionEngine._load_stats has zero error handling. Corrupt evolution_stats.json raises unhandled exception from __init__, called from OAAApp.__init__.
findings.evidence: No try/except around json.load() at engine.py:34-36; ProposalStore handles this at proposal.py:81-88
findings.recommendation: Add try/except (json.JSONDecodeError, OSError) matching ProposalStore pattern. 3-line fix.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Any local process can exfiltrate all cloud API keys by reading config.json or connecting to WebSocket get_config
LLM can execute arbitrary shell commands without user confirmation in default 'auto' permission mode
Runtime-created dynamic tools are completely undispatchable due to unguarded _tool_registry access
Synchronous json.dump calls on async event loop cause measurable blocking during multi-tool turns
Entire trust-threshold mechanism is dead code — AtomicTools.dispatch() override never called
Threading.Lock + brute-force task cancel causes deadlock or data corruption on shutdown
IdleInspector proposals execute without user confirmation in 'auto' mode via system prompt auto-approve
Corrupt evolution_stats.json prevents entire application startup
